mapper.select: SELECT d.*, dt.type_code as device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.device_type_id = dt.id WHERE d.device_uuid = #{uuid}
SELECT d.*, dt.type_code as device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.device_type_id = dt.id WHERE d.id = #{id}
SELECT d.*, dt.type_code as device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.device_type_id = dt.id ORDER BY d.id

SELECT d.*, dt.type_code as device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.device_type_id = dt.id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} OR d.id IN (SELECT ud.device_id FROM user_device ud WHERE ud.user_id = #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE device SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE device_uuid = #{uuid}
UPDATE device SET user_id = #{userId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
